title: DeveloperDAO DevNTell - Automated Security Testing for Web3
description: Josh and Dipesh from BuildBear discuss automated testing, security best practices, and how BuildBear is able to help streamline the process.

title: TEDx Chengdu 2025 | Building for Builders
description: A personal reflection on my journey from building childhood games to creating developer tools, and the lessons I learned across development, marketing, and product management while helping platforms better serve users.

title: ETH Denver 2022 | Developer Console: Learn, Create, and Operate All in One Place
description: Josh walks through Pagoda's new Developer Console, which helps developers get started and scale their dApps on NEAR.

title: NEARCon 2022 | Introducing Developer Console
description: Josh introduces NEAR Inc's plans for Developer Console, a platform which helps developers get started and scale their dApps on NEAR.

title: TruffleCon 2020 | Introducing Truffle Teams
description: Josh and Mike give an update on the Truffle Teams roadmap. They also demonstrate the power of Truffle Teams with a game.

title: TruffleCon 2019 | Building a Design System
description: Josh talks about the growth strategy for Truffle's design system and how it will be accessible to all.

title: TruffleCon 2018 | Introducing Drizzle: Fresh Chain Data for Frontends
description: Josh walks through Drizzle, his new product for keeping on-chain data in sync with frontend.

title: TruffleCon 2018 | 2018 Product Update
description: Josh walks through the latest product changes to the Truffle Suite.
